title: NextRTP
description: A better option, with better performance, a better rtp.
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c032bcb046a9a71e2a6b96d6910518a5b90e064b.png) ![layer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976f4f1a8ea403d3ad728f9213349e8f0f2530a2.png) ![partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68ebb6f712ae24d45bf0d10454b889531951746.webp) # Description NextRTP is a random teleport plugin to enhance your server, offering a performance, efficient and better of boring or/and extremely expensive plugins in performance # Key Features - Lightweight → Made with the purpose of offering a better alternative to players, prioritizing optimization, efficiency, and full RTP customization. - Teleport options → Option to customize the conditions for player teleportation (block, biome, economy, etc). - World support → Support for teleport usage across worlds. - PlaceholderAPI Support → Integrated to use and provide placeholders. - Vault Support → Integrated to use economy. - Color formats → Legacy and MiniMessage format allowed in a single message.
